rulings.Case Title: SHELDON T FONG VS. WELLS FARGO N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 8, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address: (1) Richard Carrington's failure to property follow through on the Orders to Withdraw; and (2) Kevin Mitchell's failure to file a substitution of attorney before attempting to file pleadings in the action; and (3) Kevin Mitchell's attempt to file a First Amended Complaint in violation of CCP 472. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to address only issues raised by the demurrer. Any amendments that do not directly respond to the demurrer, must be addressed by a proper motion for leave to amend. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN DONG BEST INC. ET AL VS. GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 8, 2019 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT SAN DONG BEST INC., SHUBO WANG MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT continued to November 22, 2019 to provide cross-complainant an opportunity to file a Motion for Leave to File an Amended Cross-Complaint. This motion must be filed and served in accordance with CCP 1005 and CCP 1013 and noticed for November 22, 2019 to be heard concurrently with this Motion to Strike. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN DONG BEST INC. ET AL VS. GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 8, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT DAVID TSAO Joinder To Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint OFF CALENDR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 8, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT LEAH AHN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to November 7, 2019 to be heard with other pending demurrer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOULEVARD APARTMENTS, LP VS. ART WAGONER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 8, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT ART WAGONER Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment Hearing Required to address (1) failure to appear for the Mandatory Settlement Conference; (2) medical evidence of illness. Defendant to be prepared to post with the Court up to $3,727. =(501/REQ)
